授業目的: This course provides students with a unique opportunity to learn about Japanese companies' use of management resources to generate innovation value, by focusing on the unique characteristics of Japanese markets, and Japanese culture and social issues. The course is conducted by lecture, and by interactive discussion among the students, and is based on business case studies of major companies and mid-small companies.
到達目標: Students are expected to:1. Familiarize themselves with innovation approaches adopted by established Japanese companies.2. Focus their understanding on the specifics of Japanese companies’ marketing and business strategies that optimize their organizational and management resources.3. Encourage themselves to be future business leaders at the established Japanese companies.
特記事項: 【合併】総合日本学習科目（日本企業におけるイノベーション）（CIEC）/Innovation and Intrapreneurship（国際学部）
授業方法: Face to face format lecture followed by the class discussions based on business cases.Students are expected to participate to the class discussions actively.

第1回:
【Startup Week】 https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=c7b414ee-1dbe-4327-a9a0-b406018017f3
Online class (On-demand format)《60minutes》
Introduction; In this session, introduction of lecturer, objectives and targets of the course and expected developing skills by taking this course are explained by the lecturer. Assignment is to be instructed in the class.

Pre-class learnings; Read the syllabus and understand the course target.
Post-Class learnings; Prepare assignment instructed in the online class.
第2回:
【Core Weeks①】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Characteristics of Japanese Company; In this session, the history of modern Japanese economy and industry development related to the characteristic of Japanese company are explained, followed by the interactive session among the participants.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第3回:
【Core Weeks②】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Business Framework; Business philosophy, management resources, company as a going concern, and marketing strategy are explained as a basic of business administration.
Students introduce the company of their home country, utilizing these business framework.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第4回:
【Core Weeks③】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Practice; Business Case #1; As a case of creating the new value by utilizing accumulated business resources, the development story of Fuji Film Instax Camera and the related backgrounds are explained.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第5回:
【Core Weeks④】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Discussion on Business Case #1; Based on the development story of business case #1, interactive discussion will be conducted to find the key factors for success, the alternative business strategies, and the other backgrounds.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第6回:
【Core Weeks⑤】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Business Case #2; As a case of developing potential customers by providing unprecedented customers’ satisfaction, the development story of Nintendo DS, Wii and the related backgrounds are explained.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第7回:
【Core Weeks⑥】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Discussion on Business Case #2; Based on the development story of business case #2, interactive discussion will be conducted to find the key factors for success, the alternative business strategies, and the other backgrounds.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第8回:
【Flex Hours】
Field Trip《120minutes》Date : May 30th Saturday
Students take a field trip to a sake brewery located in Nishinomiya City, the same city as KGU. While the domestic market for sake is shrinking, exports are growing. From an innovation perspective, students learn about the strategies of sake breweries that are expanding into international markets. In addition to transportation costs, an admission fee of 500 yen is required for the field trip.

Pre-class learnings; Review the materials and videos about sake brewing guided by the lecturer in advance to prepare for learning at the visit location.
Post-class learnings; Review the information and the materials from this field trip
第9回:
【Core Weeks⑦】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Business Case #3; As a case of creating the added value of the products by listening to the lead users’ voice, the development story of Panasonic Beauty products and the related backgrounds are explained.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第10回:
【Core Weeks⑧】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Discussion on Business Case #3; Based on the development story of business case #3, interactive discussion will be conducted to find the key factors for success, the alternative business strategies, and the other backgrounds.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第11回:
【Core Weeks⑨】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Business Case #4; As a case of differentiating the position among the competing companies, the product development story of Vacuum Cleaner manufacturer (Dyson, Panasonic and Iris Oyama) are explained.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第12回:
【Core Weeks⑩】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Discussion on Business Case #4; Based on the development story of business case #4, interactive discussion will be conducted to find the key factors for success, the alternative business strategies, and the other backgrounds.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第13回:
【Core Weeks⑪】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Business Case #5; As a case of autonomous management and social innovation by the local based company, the management stories of Sato Seiki Co., Ltd (Himeji city, Hyogo) are explained, followed by Q&A session with the CEO.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第14回:
【Core Weeks⑫】
Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Summary; As a summary of this course, innovative approaches and the key factors for success of business cases are reviewed through interactive discussion.

Pre-class learnings; Read assigned materials and prepare for class discussion.
Post-class learnings; Review the business case and associated class discussion.
第15回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class (Task-oriented format)《90minutes》
As preparation for the Final Term Paper, analyze the business cases studied following the instruction by the lecturer. Identify the key factors for the innovations each company pursued and clarify the behavioral norms of the business professionals who executed them as examples of intrapreneurship.
Review and organize each business case and its associated discussions, and make the necessary preparations for the task.

参考文献・資料/Reference books0: To be advised by lecturer in the class.
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。

The subjects of class discussions are to be given by the lecturer based on practical issues of Innovation and Intrapreneurship.

name: 【300】総合日本学習科目（日本企業におけるイノベーション）／JSC Innovation and Intrapreneurship
